name: Access To ADMIN$ Network Share
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Access To ADMIN$ Network Share
SIGMA Description: Detects access to ADMIN$ network share

False positives:
- Legitimate administrative activity

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=5140 AND "Share Name"='Admin$') AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Access To ADMIN$ Network Share on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=5140 AND "Share Name"='Admin$') AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Access To ADMIN$ Network Share
